form.label: Smartbus Value Add
form.description: Shows Smartbus value using scoped metric series only. This avoids double-counting across multiple Smartbus metric events.

html.div:
Smartbus decouples ingest from indexing by placing payloads in object storage and sending lightweight queue references through SQS. This provides buffering, retry capability, and resilience during indexer pressure, network interruption, or downstream ingestion delay.
This dashboard uses scoped Smartbus metric series only: name=ingestor series=message_thruput for handled ingest volume, name=ingestor series=upload upload_type=datastore for S3/object-store payload offload, and name=ingestor series=upload upload_type=bus for SQS/bus reference traffic.

search.query: index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=message_thruput queue_name="$queue_filter$" | stats sum(event_count) as events | fillnull value=0 events

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=message_thruput queue_name="$queue_filter$" | stats sum(raw_size_bytes) as raw_bytes | eval raw_gb=round(raw_bytes/1024/1024/1024,3) | fillnull value=0 raw_gb | fields raw_gb

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=message_thruput queue_name="$queue_filter$" | stats sum(successful_message_count) as successful sum(failed_message_count) as failed | fillnull value=0 successful failed | eval total=successful+failed | eval success_rate=if(total>0, round((successful/total)*100,2), 100) | fields success_rate

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=upload upload_type=datastore queue_name="$queue_filter$" | stats sum(upload_size_bytes) as s3_upload_bytes | eval s3_upload_gb=round(s3_upload_bytes/1024/1024/1024,3) | fillnull value=0 s3_upload_gb | fields s3_upload_gb

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=upload upload_type=bus queue_name="$queue_filter$" | stats sum(upload_size_bytes) as bus_upload_bytes | eval bus_upload_mb=round(bus_upload_bytes/1024/1024,3) | fillnull value=0 bus_upload_mb | fields bus_upload_mb

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=upload queue_name="$queue_filter$" upload_type IN ("datastore","bus") | stats sum(eval(if(upload_type="datastore", upload_size_bytes, 0))) as s3_upload_bytes sum(eval(if(upload_type="bus", upload_size_bytes, 0))) as bus_upload_bytes | fillnull value=0 s3_upload_bytes bus_upload_bytes | eval reference_efficiency=if(s3_upload_bytes>0, round((bus_upload_bytes/s3_upload_bytes)*100,4), 0) | fields reference_efficiency

single.option: Bus bytes as percent of S3 payload bytes

search.query: index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=message_thruput queue_name="$queue_filter$" | timechart span=5m sum(event_count) as events

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=message_thruput queue_name="$queue_filter$" | eval raw_gb=raw_size_bytes/1024/1024/1024 | timechart span=5m sum(raw_gb) as raw_gb

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=upload upload_type=datastore queue_name="$queue_filter$" | eval s3_upload_gb=upload_size_bytes/1024/1024/1024 | timechart span=5m sum(s3_upload_gb) as s3_upload_gb

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=upload upload_type=bus queue_name="$queue_filter$" | eval bus_upload_mb=upload_size_bytes/1024/1024 | timechart span=5m sum(bus_upload_mb) as bus_upload_mb

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=message_thruput queue_name="$queue_filter$" | timechart span=5m sum(successful_message_count) as successful_messages sum(failed_message_count) as failed_messages

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=message_thruput queue_name="$queue_filter$" | stats sum(event_count) as events sum(raw_size_bytes) as raw_bytes sum(encoded_size_bytes) as encoded_bytes sum(successful_message_count) as successful_messages sum(failed_message_count) as failed_messages by queue_name queue_type encoding_format | eval raw_gb=round(raw_bytes/1024/1024/1024,3) | eval encoded_gb=round(encoded_bytes/1024/1024/1024,3) | eval total_messages=successful_messages+failed_messages | eval success_rate=if(total_messages>0, round((successful_messages/total_messages)*100,2), 100) | eval encoded_to_raw_ratio=if(raw_bytes>0, round(encoded_bytes/raw_bytes,3), null()) | table queue_name queue_type encoding_format events raw_gb encoded_gb encoded_to_raw_ratio successful_messages failed_messages success_rate | sort - raw_gb

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor series=upload queue_name="$queue_filter$" upload_type IN ("datastore","bus") | stats sum(upload_size_bytes) as upload_bytes by queue_name upload_type upload_service | eval upload_gb=round(upload_bytes/1024/1024/1024,6) | eval upload_mb=round(upload_bytes/1024/1024,3) | table queue_name upload_type upload_service upload_mb upload_gb upload_bytes | sort queue_name upload_type

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus queue_name="$queue_filter$" | stats count sum(event_count) as events sum(raw_size_bytes) as raw_bytes sum(encoded_size_bytes) as encoded_bytes sum(upload_size_bytes) as upload_bytes sum(successful_message_count) as successful_messages sum(failed_message_count) as failed_messages by name series upload_type upload_service queue_name | eval raw_gb=round(raw_bytes/1024/1024/1024,6) | eval encoded_gb=round(encoded_bytes/1024/1024/1024,6) | eval upload_gb=round(upload_bytes/1024/1024/1024,6) | table name series upload_type upload_service queue_name count events raw_gb encoded_gb upload_gb successful_messages failed_messages | sort name series upload_type queue_name

panel.title: Do Not Use for Value Math

html.div: Avoid searches like: index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus | stats sum(raw_size_bytes) That can inflate the totals because Smartbus emits multiple metric series for related movement. Use name=ingestor series=message_thruput for handled ingest volume.
